sections.primaryMedia: work style, workspace scope, and runtime radio cards
sections.interactionModel: Choose one option per step, move with keyboard or pointer, and confirm a versioned preference
sections.motionTimeline: Content cross-fades for 160ms; reduced motion replaces the transition with an immediate update
failureConditions: API workspace data loads before runtime selection
Team selection grants authority
Cloud selection implies billing or live synchronization

sections.treatment: one config-driven shell with four information architectures
sections.primaryMedia: workspace navigation, active context, content, and optional inspector
sections.interactionModel: Switch work style or scope without changing project identity or duplicating durable data
sections.motionTimeline: Navigation selection tints in 160ms and route focus moves to the new heading
failureConditions: Four separate apps drift
Presentation exposes forbidden capabilities
Mobile stacks the desktop rail above content

sections.primaryMedia: today view, work, automations, files, progress, and results
sections.interactionModel: Describe an outcome, review the plain-language plan, approve consequential steps, and inspect the result
sections.motionTimeline: Only affected progress rows and status labels update
failureConditions: Developer jargon dominates
Technical metadata cannot be expanded
A local-only result is labeled synced

sections.primaryMedia: repositories, threads, changes, runs, skills, logs, and diffs
sections.interactionModel: Choose a repository context, run governed work, inspect exact changes and checks, and approve effects
sections.motionTimeline: Run and file state updates in place without decorative movement
failureConditions: Diffs or logs are replaced with vague summaries
Controls exceed server-authorized capabilities

sections.primaryMedia: assigned work, approvals, shared knowledge, people, and activity
sections.interactionModel: Create shared work, assign owners, request review, comment, approve, and follow handoffs when capabilities exist
sections.motionTimeline: New activity appears on the shared spine and preserves reading position
failureConditions: A selected Team profile pretends a team exists
Owner or role meaning relies on color alone

sections.treatment: governed engineering queue and review workspace
sections.primaryMedia: repositories, work queue, reviews, environments, policies, checks, and audit
sections.interactionModel: Assign engineering work, inspect diffs and checks, review governed actions, and enforce policies
sections.motionTimeline: Queue, check, and review status updates in place with stable sorting
failureConditions: Environment secrets are displayed
Client labels are treated as authorization

sections.primaryMedia: Local state, Cloud Preview, Google entry capability, and recovery actions
sections.interactionModel: Use this computer now or inspect Cloud Preview; sign in only when the backend advertises support
sections.motionTimeline: Connection states announce in place; reconnect does not move focus
failureConditions: Cloud Preview shows card inputs or purchase success
Offline writes are enabled without a durable queue
Credentials enter browser persistence

sections.treatment: optional desktop pane and full-screen mobile dialog
sections.primaryMedia: selected work, files, decisions, checks, and artifacts
sections.interactionModel: Open contextual detail, act within authority, close with button or Escape, and return focus
sections.motionTimeline: Inspector enters in 280ms or appears immediately under reduced motion
failureConditions: Inspector obscures context without a close path
Focus is lost after close
